## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the principle of least privilege
- [ ] No wildcards in resource ARNs
- [ ] No administrative access granted
- [ ] `make fmt` / `terraform fmt -recursive -check` passes
- [ ] `make validate` / `terraform validate` passes
- [ ] `make test` / `terraform test` passes
- [ ] Updated `README.md` template tables (if applicable)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md`
